changeSet.author: librelog
changeSet.comment: Create organizations table for multi-tenant support

changeSet.author: librelog
changeSet.comment: Create markets table for geographic market grouping

changeSet.author: librelog
changeSet.comment: Add organization_id, market_id, cluster_id, and is_active to stations table
changeSet.sql: -- Create a default organization for existing stations INSERT INTO organizations (id, name, is_active, created_at, updated_at) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Default Organization', true, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM organizations WHERE name = 'Default Organization');

-- Link existing stations to default organization UPDATE stations SET organization_id = (SELECT id FROM organizations WHERE name = 'Default Organization' LIMIT 1), is_active = true WHERE organization_id IS NULL;

changeSet.author: librelog
changeSet.comment: Add organization_id, market_id, and is_active to clusters table
changeSet.sql: -- Link existing clusters to default organization UPDATE clusters SET organization_id = (SELECT id FROM organizations WHERE name = 'Default Organization' LIMIT 1), is_active = true WHERE organization_id IS NULL;

changeSet.author: librelog
changeSet.comment: Add format_type, description, and is_active to channels table
changeSet.sql: -- Set default format type for existing channels UPDATE channels SET format_type = 'LINEAR', is_active = true WHERE format_type IS NULL;

changeSet.author: librelog
changeSet.comment: Add channel_id column to clock_templates if station_id exists

changeSet.author: librelog
changeSet.comment: Migrate clock_templates from station_id to channel_id

changeSet.author: librelog
changeSet.comment: Create default channels for clock templates without channels

changeSet.author: librelog
changeSet.comment: Add constraints and drop old station_id column
